result.summary: I found 2 visually noticeable issues: a blank header CTA and an on-page overlay that obscures the legal fine print at the bottom of the promotion.

issues.description: The top-right header button appears as an unlabeled yellow pill with no visible text or icon.
issues.suggestion: Populate the button with the intended CTA label or icon, or remove the button if it is not supposed to be shown yet.

issues.description: The translucent 'SCROLL DOWN' overlay sits on top of the small terms-and-conditions text, making the legal copy hard to read.
issues.suggestion: Move the overlay lower, reduce its size, or hide it after initial load so it does not cover important fine print.
